info.description: Self-hosted personal finance and budgeting API (Go port).
info.title: Econumo API

post.description: Creates an account (idempotent on the request id), optionally seeding its balance, in the given folder.
Creates an account folder for the user (name unique among the user's folders).
Soft-deletes an account. Requires ownership.

get.description: Returns all the user's available accounts (each with owner, currency, folder, position, balance) in reverse order.
Returns the user's account folders ordered by position.

post.description: Marks a folder (and its accounts) hidden. Requires ownership.
Repositions accounts and moves them between folders, returning the full list.
Applies position changes to the user's folders and returns the full ordered list.
Moves a folder's accounts into another folder and deletes it. Requires ownership of both.
Clears a folder's hidden flag. Requires ownership.
Updates an account's name/icon/currency and reconciles its balance via a correction transaction. Requires ownership.
Renames a folder the user owns (name unique among the user's folders).

post.summary: Exclude an account from a budget
Include an account in a budget

post.description: Marks a category archived. Requires ownership.
Creates a category for the authenticated user. Idempotent on the request id.
Deletes a category (mode=delete) or reassigns its transactions to a replacement then deletes it (mode=replace). Requires ownership.

get.description: Returns all the authenticated user's categories (archived and not) ordered by position.

post.description: Applies position changes to the user's categories and returns the full ordered list.
Clears a category's archived flag. Requires ownership.
Updates a category's name and icon. Requires ownership.
Redeems an invite code, connecting the user with the invite's owner.
Disconnects the user from a connected user, revoking shared access.
Clears the user's outstanding connection invite (no-op if none).
Generates (or refreshes) the user's connection invite code.

get.description: Returns the user's connected users, each with the accounts shared between them.

post.description: Removes a connected user's grant on an account you own or administer.
Grants or updates a connected user's role on an account you own or administer.

get.description: Returns all currencies ordered by ISO code. The name is the English display name.
Returns all currency rates published on the most-recent available date.

post.description: Marks a payee archived. Requires ownership.
Creates a payee for the authenticated user. Idempotent on the request id; the name must be unique among the user's payees.
Deletes a payee. Transactions referencing it have their payee cleared. Requires ownership.

get.description: Returns all the authenticated user's payees (archived and not) ordered by position.

post.description: Applies position changes to the user's payees and returns the full ordered list.
Clears a payee's archived flag. Requires ownership.
Updates a payee's name. Requires ownership; the new name must be unique among the user's payees.
Marks a tag archived. Requires ownership.
Creates a tag for the authenticated user. Idempotent on the request id; the name must be unique among the user's tags.
Deletes a tag. Transactions referencing it have their tag cleared. Requires ownership.

get.description: Returns all the authenticated user's tags (archived and not) ordered by position.

post.description: Applies position changes to the user's tags and returns the full ordered list.
Clears a tag's archived flag. Requires ownership.
Updates a tag's name. Requires ownership; the new name must be unique among the user's tags.
Creates a transaction (idempotent on the request id) and returns it plus the refreshed account list.
Deletes a transaction and returns it plus the refreshed account list.

get.description: Returns a CSV (text/csv) of transactions on the selected accounts (comma-separated accountId), or all accessible accounts when omitted.
get.summary: Export the transaction list as CSV

get.description: Returns transactions for an account, or a date window across visible accounts, or all visible-account transactions.

post.description: Imports transactions from an uploaded CSV using a field mapping (JSON) and optional per-import overrides; find-or-creates accounts/categories/payees/tags.
post.summary: Import a transaction list from CSV

post.description: Updates a transaction and returns it plus the refreshed account list.
Marks the authenticated user's onboarding complete and returns the refreshed user.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's raw persisted options ({items: [...]}).
Returns the authenticated user's profile ({user: CurrentUserResult}).

post.description: Authenticates a user by username/password and returns an opaque access token plus the current user.

200.description: Raw {token,user} body — NOT wrapped in the standard envelope (matches PHP login).

post.description: Revokes the presenting session token.
Creates a new user (when registration is enabled) and returns the current user without a token.
Triggers a password reminder email. Always returns success (anti-enumeration).
Resets a user's password using a reminder code. Returns an empty success envelope.
Sets the authenticated user's default budget and returns the refreshed user.
Updates the authenticated user's base currency and returns the refreshed user.
Updates the authenticated user's display name (length 3..20) and returns the refreshed user.
Changes the authenticated user's password after verifying the old one. Returns an empty success envelope.
Updates the authenticated user's reporting period option and returns the refreshed user.
